name: Vegetable Clam Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 package (16 oz.) frozen mixed vegetables (such as Broccoli, Corn, and Red Peppers mix)
2 can (6.5 ounces each) minced clams, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place margarine and frozen vegetables in a 3-quart microwavable casserole.
2. Cover tightly and microwave on high for 8 to 10 minutes or until hot.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients (minced clams, milk, salt, and pepper).
4. Cover tightly and continue microwaving on medium-high (70%) for 10 to 12 minutes, stirring after 5 minutes, until hot.
